197],[488,486,1776547811210],[473,489,1776547811220],[458,491,1776547811233],[442,494,1776547811245],[427,497,1776547811258],[412,500,1776547811271],[399,503,1776547811283],[386,505,1776547811293],[374,508,1776547811307],[363,510,1776547811320],[354,512,1776547811331],[346,514,1776547811347],[340,515,1776547811359],[335,516,1776547811375],[331,517,1776547811393],[329,518,1776547811410],[328,518,1776547811427],[327,518,1776547811444],[328,516,1776547811460],[328,515,1776547811472],[329,514,1776547811481],[330,512,1776547811495],[331,511,1776547811504],[332,510,1776547811516],[331,510,1776547811534],[330,510,1776547811567],[329,510,1776547811585],[329,511,1776547811597],[328,511,1776547811605],[327,511,1776547811622],[326,511,1776547811657],[325,511,1776547811674],[325,512,1776547811680],[324,512,1776547811691],[324,513,1776547811696]],"mm-mp":17.666666666666668,"md":[[333,509,1776547811522]],"md-mp":3820.25,"mu":[[333,509,1776547811651]],"mu-mp":3834.5},"v":1,"tc":{}}
